product_information.product_name: Jil Sander No.4 eau de parfum 100 ML
product_information.description: Een fruitige, bloemige geur met noten van o.a. bergamot, perzik, pruim, jasmijn, tuberoos, amber, vanille, patchoeli, estragon.

inferred_information.raw_ingredients: Alcohol Denat., Aqua/Water/Eau, Parfum/Fragrance, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Linaloll, Hydroxycitronellal, Benzyl Saliclate, Alpha-isomethyl Ionone, Butyl Methoxydibenzoylmethane, Citronellol, Geraniol, Eugenol, Limonene, Octocrylene, Benzyl Benzoate, Bht, Farnesol, Benzyl Alcohol, Isoeugenol, Citral, D&C Orange N°. 4 (CI 15510), Fd&C Red N°. 4 (CI 14700).
